hero.subtitle: Next-gen business infrastructure — create on-chain entities, drive growth with community networks, let AI operate for you

painPoints.title: Three
painPoints.subtitle: Reimagine how business works
painPoints.q1: What if your loyalty points could be freely traded like stocks?
painPoints.d1: Register entities on-chain, issue tokens, open shops, DAO governance — economic sovereignty returns to the entity itself.
painPoints.q2: What if every referral commission was distributed on-chain, fully transparent?
painPoints.d2: 5 commission modes, multi-tier member upgrades, spillover placement, on-chain ads — self-driven growth flywheel.
painPoints.q3: What if an AI butler managed your community 24/7, set prices, and handled orders?
painPoints.d3: TEE-protected AI community manager, smart operations assistant, automated decision advisor — reduce costs, boost efficiency.

cta.bigCtaDesc: Join the NEXUS ecosystem and be a pioneer in entity economy tokenization

tokenize.title: Entity Economy Tokenization
tokenize.subtitle: Bring a traditional business entity fully on-chain — register identity, issue tokens, open shop, enable trading, launch governance. Economic sovereignty returns to the entity.
tokenize.comp1T: Loyalty points locked in platform, non-transferable
tokenize.comp1N: Tokens freely tradeable on-chain, truly owned by users
tokenize.comp2T: High barrier to equity financing, low liquidity
tokenize.comp2N: Token Sale public fundraising, tokens are instantly liquid
tokenize.comp3N: All transactions auditable on-chain, open source verifiable
tokenize.comp4N: DAO proposal voting, token holders have a say
tokenize.stepsSubtitle: From zero to one, the complete on-chain business entity lifecycle
tokenize.s1D1: 4 entity types with different governance models
tokenize.s4D2: Circuit breaker — auto-pause on abnormal volatility
tokenize.s5Desc: DAO proposals, token holders have voting rights
tokenize.s5D1: 41 proposal types covering all operational decisions
tokenize.s5D2: Time-weighted voting — long-term holders have more weight
tokenize.s5D3: Committee veto power + governance mode can be locked
tokenize.kycDesc: 4-level system (Basic → Enhanced → Institutional → Custom), multi-provider competition, high-risk country controls
tokenize.disclosureDesc: Insider registration, trading window controls, mandatory disclosure of material events, preventing insider trading
tokenize.arbitrationDesc: Fund escrow → on-chain evidence → committee ruling, complete three-stage dispute resolution
tokenize.ctaTitle: Ready to bring your entity on-chain?

growth.title: Community Marketing Engine
growth.subtitle: 5 commission modes with full on-chain transparent settlement, auto member upgrades, spillover placement drives network self-expansion — self-driven growth flywheel
growth.modesSubtitle: Plugin architecture — mix and match, all settled on-chain automatically
growth.m1Desc: A refers B, B buys, A earns commission. Supports direct/multi-level/first-order/repeat flexible configs.
growth.m2Desc: Commission based on member level differential — higher levels earn the gap, incentivizing upgrades.
growth.m3Desc: Direct upline/downline commission, simple structure. Upline auto-promotes based on cumulative income.
growth.m4Desc: N-layer waterfall commission + tier activation conditions, deep network auto-settlement.
growth.m5Desc: Split round reward pool by level ratio. Long-term holders and high-level members get more allocation.
growth.flywheelSubtitle: 6 auto-upgrade triggers + spillover placement = network self-expansion
growth.spilloverDesc: When a referrer's direct referral count hits the soft limit, new members auto-spill to vacant descendant nodes in the referrer's subtree.
growth.spilloverS1: Off-chain BFS search → find subtree vacancy
growth.spilloverS3: Record true referrer → correct commission attribution
growth.spilloverResult: Result: network grows like a tree, balanced expansion
growth.adsL1: Campaign budget locked on-chain in escrow
growth.adsL3: Three-way split: platform / community nodes / creators
growth.p2pL2: Market maker registration + on-chain credit score
growth.p2pL4: TWAP price protection + deviation circuit breaker
growth.ctaTitle: Drive your growth with community networks

ai.title: AI-Powered Enterprise
ai.subtitle: AI doesn't replace you — it becomes your 24/7 business partner. TEE hardware protected, on-chain auditable, DAO controllable.
ai.l1F1: 5 rule chains: anti-spam → blacklist → command handling → join review → default behavior
ai.l1F2: Natural language understanding — beyond keyword matching
ai.l1F4: Adaptive rules — auto-adjusts strategy based on community activity
ai.l1S2: Bot keys generated inside enclave, never exposed
ai.l2F1: Smart pricing — analyze market depth + history → recommend optimal listing price
ai.l2F2: Inventory alerts — monitor sales trends → predict sell-out time
ai.l2F3: Commission optimization — analyze ROI per mode → recommend optimal params
ai.l2F4: Risk detection — monitor abnormal trades → auto-trigger circuit breaker
ai.l2F5: KYC assist — AI pre-reviews documents → reduce manual review burden
ai.l3Subtitle: AI analyzes → generates proposal → DAO votes → on-chain execution
ai.l3F1: Product A unsold for 7 days → auto-draft price adjustment proposal → DAO vote → execute if passed
ai.l3F2: Referral chain tier-3 commission ROI below tier-2 → suggest commission parameter adjustment
ai.l3F3: Community activity drops 30% → suggest launching ad campaign
ai.l3F4: AI suggestion + human voting = safe automated decisions
ai.ctaTitle: Let AI be your business partner

tech.title: Tech
tech.subtitle: 40+ on-chain modules, TEE hardware security, decentralized storage — blockchain infrastructure built for the real economy
tech.f1Desc: Sovereign Layer-1 blockchain, 6-second blocks, fully customizable Runtime
tech.f2Desc: Intel TDX + SGX dual support, DCAP on-chain verification, keys never exposed
tech.f3Desc: GroupRobot runs in Gramine enclave, behavior is auditable
